narrative:
Precinct Center Township (precinct in Morgan County) has 454 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.3 percentage points.
